target: 9. Summer Time Rendering
July 24
(Two days later. It's the day of Hitogashima's biggest event, the Hitogashima Summer Festival.)
(Tourists are flocking to the island. People looking to stay over and have fun are pouring into the inn where I'm staying too, making it noisy beyond belief.)
(It can't be helped... I suppose I'll go somewhere else.)
Welcome!
Hey, Alain.
Oh, Hizuru. You came back again, huh.
Ah, Hizuru~!
Asako? What about Koba Mart. Are you working here?
No, no. I just came to have lunch with Shiori.
Sis, you're here.
Even Ryunosuke is here. Are you having lunch too?

Yeah.
Kofune's lunch is delicious.
Haha, those are kind words.
Sis, you didn't come to our place after all. Have you been staying at the inn this whole time?
Yeah, I relaxed for the first time in a while. I got some good rest.
Ah, so that's why.
Sis, your atmosphere seems to have changed. It's like a weight has been lifted off your shoulders.
A weight off my shoulders... huh. That might certainly be the case.
It's been a really long time since I spent time without thinking about anything like this. I wonder how many years it's been.
What!? Spending time without thinking about anything... Even you can do it if you try, Hizuru.
Well, it was a surprise even to me.
Ah, Hizuru-chan!
Hey, Hoine. Thanks for your help the day before yesterday.
Yup, I sure did take care of you!
Hey now, Hoine. You shouldn't talk like that.
Hoine-chan! Something went weird! The screen is flashing!
Huh? Really? Let me see?
H-Hey, wait a sec, Hoine! Don't break your dad's tablet, okay!?
...It's lively.
Sorry, Alain-san. For making a racket.
It's fine at this time. Lunch is over, and the restaurant has calmed down.
What are you going to do, Hizuru? If you're hungry, I can whip something up for you?
No, just coffee is fine.
Sure thing. I'll get that ready right away.
Are you enjoying your vacation? I heard you're also doing research for your new work, is it going well?
Well, I wonder. Honestly, I haven't solidified any concepts for my next work yet, but...
Well, it'll work out somehow.
Mama~, look at this for a sec~.
Yes, yes. Well then, Hizuru, see you later.
Yeah.
Sorry for the wait, I'll just set your coffee down here.
Ah, thank you.
Alain, it's about time to start prepping for the evening, right. I'll help out.
Well, I appreciate that, but... It's fine if you rest a bit more, you know? Lunch was crowded, so you must be tired.
But tonight is the festival, right? It's going to get busy, so I thought it'd be better to get moving early.
I see. That might certainly be true.
...Ah! N-Nagumo-sensei!?
You're the boy from that time...
Good grief, you really surprised me back then.
I'm truly sorry about that!
U-Um, it definitely wasn't on purpose! It seems I was having a bit of a weird dream!!
Ah, I don't mind about that. What surprised me was having my identity guessed by a boy I've never met.
Huh…?
This is a good opportunity. Explain to me why you knew my true identity.
My profile is completely private. And yet, how were you able to determine that I was "Ryunosuke Nagumo" with just one glance?
Well... um... I don't really know how to express it myself, but...
I feel like I learned that fact... in my dream.
In a dream…?
Ugh... Um, I'm really not messing around or anything...
That's certainly not normal...
Right! I'm sorry.
That story is truly fascinating.
Huh?
Come now, tell me in detail!
...I see. You had a strange dream accompanied by a sense of reality while on the ferry.
And apparently, your childhood friend, Ushio Kofune, had the exact same dream-- Is that right?
Yes. Although the memories from the dream are already hazy.
The contents I can remember in fragments don't seem like they could possibly be a dream...
And you learned my true identity in that dream?
I think that might be the case... Neither Ushio nor I can remember the specific details, though...
A prophetic dream... or perhaps, a memory...
Memories of a parallel world--
Hoine! Can you give Papa's tablet back soon?
Just a little bit longer! I'm taking pictures with Shiori-chan right now.
Let's take a picture together too, Mama~!
Sure. Then why don't you get in too, Ryu-kun?
I wonder? It might be hard to fit this many people in a selfie.
What's wrong? Does it bother you?
No... that girl Hoine...
She is the daughter of my younger brother, Ryunosuke.
I'm glad...
Glad?
It's strange... I wonder why I feel that way...
Who knows. It doesn't look to me like you're just saying random things, but...
Depending on who's listening, it's a suspicious statement.
Ahaha... Well, I guess so.
Sis. Don't bully Shinpei too much.
Shinpei is a huge fan of "Ryunosuke Nagumo". It's not strange that your true identity was exposed!
I am a masked author! I haven't shown my face anywhere... Don't butt in with your nonsensical deductions, you idiot!!
Sorry about that, okay? Sis is really on edge right now preparing for her new work.
Hah!?
But despite how she seems, she's happy to meet a fan!
Wh... What are you saying!
A new work... are you writing it right now!?
...Well, yes.
Wow, that's amazing...! Is it the Saint series!? Or something else...
L-Like I would tell you!
However, well...
I came to Wakayama for both research and rest, but your story was an unexpected harvest.
Let me hear more details about that story from earlier.
Y-Yes!
Hmm... I see...
Numerous parallel worlds and the memories of them... Yes, not bad.
But, that alone is still weak.
It is a well-worn subject, after all... If only there was something more... a newer angle...!
Something...?
Exactly. I want an element that will make this story stand out more vividly. Just one more push, but...
Why is this lady making such a difficult face?
Hizuru-chan is working hard to create an interesting story right now.
A story? Hmm...
If that's the case, I want her to write a story about this island.
Ah, that's a great idea! Hey, Hizuru-chan, did you hear that!?
...Hear what?
If you're going to write a story anyway, why not make it about this island! You gathered so much information about the island, too!
Information about the island--
Uncertain and incomprehensible, and therefore an existence that shows a new perspective...
Best friends... Betrayal...
Hunger... Going back in time...
A warrior who fights in secret...
Child and parent... Light and shadow...
And... the Ajiro boy's memories.
Excuse me for a moment…
A-A handstand...
It's connected!!!!
Whoa!?
Wh-What is it? Raising your voice all of a sudden...
It's connected... everything is connected.
I might have... come up with an interesting idea...
Here it comes! Here it comes! Here it comes!!
Fuhahaha, it has descended upon me!! This is my victory!!
S-Sensei?
Hizuru-chan looks like she's having so much fun! She's grinning from ear to ear!
Fufu... Ufufu! My hands won't stop anymore!
Fuhahahahahahaha! This is good, this is good! I can do this! This will work!
It looks like Sis's switch has been flipped. Once she gets like this, there's no stopping her.
Then, you'll be able to write your new work!?
Yes, indeed!
You are the benefactor who gave me the catalyst to create this work! I will at least tell you the title!
I just thought of the perfect title for this work!
B-By all means!!
Listen well! The title of my next work is!
"Summer Time Rendering"!
Ooooh~~~!!
Key TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_EPILOGIE_HDR>epilogue: Hizuru Minakata</color>] obtained.
